text: In the first scene, I feel a certain solitude and expectation. The space is open, quiet, and minimal, prompting reflection on purpose and potential. The second scene is brighter and energetic, filled with the intriguing language of research and development. Here, curiosity is sparked by the invitation to learn and engage with the interface between humanity and technology. I oscillate between contemplation and inspiration, pulled by the silent architecture and then by the vivid call of innovation.
